description: Composition Pink dotted strappy dress made of 100% cotton, has elastication at the chest, elastication at the back, velvety plush toy adornment on the neckline, flaring skirt and branding above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycle Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Medium heat steam iron do not iron on decorations Do not dry in sunlight Catching butterflies in summer - that's what this frock from doodle is perfect for! Crafted with pure absorbent cotton (for her comfort), pretty tier details and the plush toy decoration at the neck, this piece is perfect for a spring fete or an evening stroll in the park.
